plugins.name: WooCommerceAnalytics
plugins.description: Drive more revenue, improve your sales funnel, and get accurate insights with our Matomo Analytics Ecommerce tracking integration for your WooCommerce.

plugins.name: OAuth2
plugins.description: Provide secure access to the Matomo API using scoped permissions. No static credentials.

plugins.name: FormAnalytics
plugins.description: Increase conversions on your online forms and lose less visitors by learning everything about your users behavior and their pain points on your forms.

plugins.name: Migration
plugins.description: Migrate/copy any measurable (site, app, roll-up) from one Matomo to another Matomo.

plugins.name: ApiReference
plugins.description: Modern interactive API documentation for Matomo based on OpenAPI (Swagger). Explore endpoints, parameters, and responses directly in your browser.

plugins.name: CustomAlerts
plugins.description: Create custom Alerts to be notified of important changes on your website or app!

plugins.name: EnterpriseBundle
plugins.description: Elevate your global brand’s end-to-end marketing with intelligent analytics, including enterprise-grade compliance and elite support to drive impact at scale.

plugins.name: BusinessBundle
plugins.description: Empower your teams with integrated insights, advanced analytics and enhanced security to drive strategic action and market share.

plugins.name: TeamBundle
plugins.description: Equip your startup or marketing team to make smarter, faster decisions with powerful analytics to drive increased conversion and revenue growth.

plugins.name: McpServer
plugins.description: Early preview: Connect Matomo to ChatGPT, Claude & MCP clients securely. Ask questions and get insights from your analytics instantly.

plugins.name: MarketingCampaignsReporting
plugins.description: Measure the effectiveness of your marketing campaigns. New reports, segments & track up to five channels: campaign, source, medium, keyword, content.

plugins.name: MicrosoftTeams
plugins.description: Send Matomo reports and alerts to Microsoft Team channels, keeping your team informed and ready to act in real time.

plugins.name: HeatmapSessionRecording
plugins.description: Truly understand your visitors by seeing where they click, hover, type and scroll. Replay their actions in a video and ultimately increase conversions.

plugins.name: GoogleAnalyticsImporter
plugins.description: Import reports from a Google Analytics account into Matomo.

plugins.name: CrashAnalytics
plugins.description: Detect crashes to improve the user experience, increase conversions and recover revenue. Resolve them with insights to minimise developer hours.

plugins.name: CustomReports
plugins.description: Pull out the information you need in order to be successful. Develop your custom strategy to meet your individualized goals while saving money & time.

plugins.name: LoginSaml
plugins.description: Provides SAML-based Single Sign-On (SSO) support for Matomo. Works with any Identity Provider (IdP) such as OneLogin, Microsoft Entra ID, Google, and.

plugins.name: AdvertisingConversionExport
plugins.description: Provides an export of attributed goal conversions for usage in ad networks like Google Ads so you no longer need a conversion pixel.

plugins.name: AbTesting
plugins.description: Increase revenue and conversions by comparing different versions of your websites or apps & detect the winning variation that will grow your business!

plugins.name: LoginLdap
plugins.description: LDAP authentication and synchronization for Matomo.

plugins.name: Funnels
plugins.description: Identify and understand where your visitors drop off to increase your conversions, sales and revenue with your existing traffic.

plugins.name: TrackingSpamPrevention
plugins.description: This plugin offers various options to prevent spammers and bots from making your data inaccurate so you can rely on your data again.

plugins.name: Cohorts
plugins.description: Track your retention efforts over time and keep your visitors engaged and coming back for more.

plugins.name: MediaAnalytics
plugins.description: Grow your business with advanced video & audio analytics. Get powerful insights into how your audience watches your videos and listens to your audio.

plugins.name: Provider
plugins.description: Reports the Internet Service Provider of the visitors.

plugins.name: TreemapVisualization
plugins.description: Visualise any report in Matomo as a Treemap. Click on the Treemap icon in each report to load the visualisation.

plugins.name: UsersFlow
plugins.description: Users Flow is a visual representation of the most popular paths your users take through your website & app which lets you understand your users needs.

plugins.name: SEOWebVitals
plugins.description: Improve your website performance, rank higher in search results and optimise your visitor experience with SEO Web Vitals.

plugins.name: SearchEngineKeywordsPerformance
plugins.description: All keywords searched by your users on search engines are now visible into your Referrers reports! The ultimate solution to 'Keyword not defined'.

plugins.name: RollUpReporting
plugins.description: At a glance, see how several of your websites, mobile apps & shops are performing overall. Get new insights into your business & save time every day.

plugins.name: MultiChannelConversionAttribution
plugins.description: Get a clear understanding of how much credit each of your marketing channel is actually responsible for to shift your marketing efforts wisely.

plugins.name: LogViewer
plugins.description: View log messages logged by Matomo.

plugins.name: CustomVariables
plugins.description: Categorise your visitors and actions with custom name-value pairs. Segment by these values and get more insights to draw the right conclusions.

plugins.name: CustomTranslations
plugins.description: Translate entities and tracked values into different languages. For example Custom dimensions, dashboard names, custom report names, event values, ...

plugins.name: Bandwidth
plugins.description: Monitor Bandwidth for each page, download, and measure overall traffic in bytes. For requirements check out the description.

plugins.name: ActivityLog
plugins.description: Get a detailed audit log of all activities happening in your Matomo Analytics for increased security, risk management, and problem diagnostic.

plugins.name: Slack
plugins.description: Send Matomo reports and alerts to Slack channels, keeping your team informed and ready to act in real time.

plugins.name: QueuedTracking
plugins.description: Scale your large traffic Matomo service by queuing tracking requests in Redis or MySQL for better performance and reliability when experiencing peaks.

plugins.name: VisitorGenerator
plugins.description: Developer tool that lets you generate fake visits. Useful if you are working with plugins or themes or if you use the Matomo API.

plugins.name: TasksTimetable
plugins.description: List all maintenance tasks that are scheduled to run. Displays the task names and next execution time in a table.

plugins.name: WhiteLabel
plugins.description: Give your users and clients access to a more streamline analytics experience that is less confusing and lets your own branding shine.

plugins.name: AnonymousPiwikUsageMeasurement
plugins.description: Send anonymized usage data to your own Matomo instance or to any other Matomo.

plugins.name: JsTrackerCustom
plugins.description: This plugin allows you to add custom JavaScript to Matomos tracking code.

plugins.name: EnvironmentVariables
plugins.description: Allows you to specify Matomo config in environment variables instead of the config file.

plugins.name: SecurityInfo
plugins.description: Provides security information about your PHP environment and offers suggestions based on PhpSecInfo from the PHP Security Consortium.

plugins.name: JsTrackerForceAsync
plugins.description: Forces the JavaScript Tracker to always load asynchronous when embedding the Tracking Code via HTTP API automatically in your website.

plugins.name: InvalidateReports
plugins.description: This plugin allows Super Users to invalidate historical reports in the UI in Administration > System > Invalidate reports.

plugins.name: ForceSSL
plugins.description: Automatically redirect all http requests to https. For security reasons it is recommended to always use Matomo Analytics over https (SSL).

plugins.name: DeviceDetectorCache
plugins.description: Makes tracking faster by detecting many devices, operating systems, bots, and browsers from a cache.
